title: Human remains found on Thai cargo ship attacked in Strait of Hormuz
desc: Human remains were found within the affected area of the ​vessel ⁠MV Mayuree Naree in the Strait of ​Hormuz, which was attacked last month during ⁠the Middle East conflict, ⁠Thailand's Precious Shipping ​reported on ​Friday.

title: Unsafe levels of smog blanket 37 provinces, Mae Hong Son’s Pai district worst hit
desc: Toxic haze remains at critical levels across large parts of the country, with PM2.5 concentrations exceeding safety standards in 37 provinces, the Pollution Control Department (PCD) reported on Friday.

title: Thai regulator tightens market oversight to curb 'grey capital'
desc: Thailand’s ⁠Securities and Exchange ​Commission (SEC) is stepping up measures ​to curb ​grey capital, mule accounts and investment scams, calling it a national priority.

title: Thai Airways stresses 2 power-bank limit per passenger
desc: Thai Airways International reminds passengers of a new regulation that permits each passenger to carry up to two power banks with no permission to use or charge them on board.

title: Thai central bank chief says no drastic policy adjustment needed at the moment
desc: Thailand's central bank chief ​said there was no need for a drastic ​monetary policy adjustment at the moment, ​despite expectations of a rise in inflation driven by higher oil prices amid the war in the Middle East.

title: Man caught cooking dog meat at Udon Thani home
desc: Man caught cooking dog meat at Udon Thani home Legacy Police in Udon Thani arrested a man in Chiang Yuen subdistrict yesterday, April 2, after a Facebook post led police to his home , where officers found him cooking dog meat .

title: 泰国女演员遭性侵案嫌犯落网，警方已申请羁押
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月3日上午，曼谷Khlong Tan警局警员将涉嫌性侵女演员的34岁男子尼功押送至曼谷南部刑事法院申请首次羁押。

title: 泰国女Rapper MILLI惊艳韩国！斩获知名说唱比赛第四创历史
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，韩国人气说唱竞演节目Show Me The Money Season 12圆满落幕。泰国女Rapper MILLI成功闯入总决赛，成为节目史上首位晋级决赛的外国选手。

title: Thai woman hires friend to kill her ex-boyfriend before taking her life
desc: Thai woman hires friend to kill her ex-boyfriend before taking her life Legacy A Thai woman and her friend, who was in unrequited love with her, allegedly arranged the murder of her ex-boyfriend on the M6 motorway in Nakhon Ratchasima.

title: Thailand News | Diesel hike hits drivers again as Thai subsidy support shrinks, Music video credit row deepens as rapper points to ChatGPT chat
desc: Thailand News | Diesel hike hits drivers again as Thai subsidy support shrinks, Music video credit row deepens as rapper points to ChatGPT chat The Thaiger Today we’ll be talking about how Thai diesel subsidies are shrinking, costing drivers more at the pumps, in ASEAN news the Philippines has secured passage of energy deliveries through the strait of Hormuz, plus, police in Pattaya have launched a sweep of walking street to round up ladyboys who have been ‘harassing tourists,’ then there’s been a raid on a Bangkok school that had been employing at least 10 teachers working without proper perm

title: Three boys rescued from child begging ring in Nakhon Pathom
desc: Three boys rescued from child begging ring in Nakhon Pathom Legacy A husband and wife were arrested in Nakhon Pathom yesterday, April 2, after police uncovered an alleged child begging gang operation and rescued three boys from years of exploitation. The two suspects, 36 year old Artorn and 32 year old Pimwimon, were arrested in Takong subdistrict, Mueang district, Nakhon Pathom, under Criminal Court warrants dated March 11. They were accused of human trafficking for forced begging, along with unlawfully exploiting children through coercion and threats. Photo via MGR Online Police said the pai

title: Phuket to raise boat fares to Koh Phi Phi and tour package prices from April 5
desc: Phuket to raise boat fares to Koh Phi Phi and tour package prices from April 5 Legacy Phuket ferry and speedboat fares for routes to Koh Phi Phi, along with boat tour prices, are set to increase from April 5 after operators received approval to raise charges in response to higher fuel costs . Phuket Provincial Governor Nirat Pongsitthaworn met officials from the Phuket Provincial Marine Department and local operators at about 1.30pm yesterday, April 2, to discuss rising operating costs linked to fuel prices. Operators told officials they had been absorbing the higher costs since fuel prices in

title: Homeless man held after stone attack on bar owners in Pattaya
desc: Homeless man held after stone attack on bar owners in Pattaya Legacy Two beer bar owners were injured after a homeless man threw stones at their motorbike in Pattaya yesterday, April 2, while they were riding home on Khao Phra Tamnak Road in Nong Prue, Bang Lamung district, Chon Buri. Police from Pattaya City Police Station said they were called to the scene, where rescue volunteers from Sawang Boriboon Thammasathan Pattaya were also sent to assist. Police found two injured beer bar owners at the scene. The first was 49 year old Preedee, who suffered a cut to the face and bruising. The second

title: 泰国商业部多项目助力“本地好物走向全球”
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国商业部国际贸易促进厅（DITP）表示，作为负责连接泰国业者与全球市场的部门，DITP计划以“THINK THAILAND NEXT LEVEL”为概念，通过各种项目和平台，持续推动泰国商品和服务升级。

title: Burmese mother confesses to killing 7 year old daughter in Bangkok
desc: Burmese mother confesses to killing 7 year old daughter in Bangkok Legacy Police arrested a Burmese woman on Koh Larn in Chon Buri yesterday, April 2, after she killed her seven year old daughter at a house in Min Buri district, Bangkok.

title: Six Cambodians held in Trat crab meat smuggling case
desc: Six Cambodians held in Trat crab meat smuggling case Legacy A joint maritime operation in Trat intercepted a Cambodian boat allegedly involved in crab meat smuggling yesterday, April 2, seizing multiple crates of picked crab meat and detaining six Cambodian crew members.

title: 攀牙荣登全球“旅行者点评奖”第一名！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月2日，泰国安达曼海岸边的美丽天堂“攀牙”于近日力压全球众多知名城市，拿下了Booking.com“旅行者点评奖”（Traveller Review Awards 2026）第一名。
